firstNightReminder: Show the Paperboy the character token of 3 characters, none of which are in play.
name: 送报童
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知三个不在场的角色。
flavor: Extra, extra! Read all about it! A pestilence spreads in the north! Sadness spreads in the south! Lies spread from your mouth!

firstNightReminder: Show the Violinist the character token of the player marked "Known". Count which direction between this character and the Violinist has the least steps. Then count how many evil players are between the Violinist and that character in this direction. Show fingers (1, 2 etc.) equaling the number of evil players you counted.
name: 小提琴手
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一个在场角色，并且你会得知你到那个在场角色最近距离之间有多少名邪恶玩家。（邻座玩家距离为1）
flavor: Do you hear that? The higher notes in your deeper notes. No, that's a good thing, lean into it. From the top!

firstNightReminder: Wake the Trapper. Show them the character token of the Minion marked "Known". Put the Beastmaster to sleep.
otherNightReminder: If the Trapper has the Night 3 reminder token, wake the Trapper. Think about what character the Minion marked "Known" has been mad that they are. Show the Trapper the character token of this character, and then put them to sleep.
name: 陷阱师
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一个爪牙角色。在第3个夜晚，你会得知他正“疯狂”地证明他是的那个角色。
flavor: Did you just implicate that there's only 1 way to skin a cat? Allow me to give a quick presentation on how impossibly incorrect you are.

firstNightReminder: The Foreman points to three players who all neighbor each other. If one, and only one, is evil then nod your head yes. If this is not the case, shake your head no.
otherNightReminder: The Foreman points to three players who all neighbor each other. If one, and only one, is evil then nod your head yes. If this is not the case, shake your head no.
name: 工头
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一组三人邻座的玩家(不能选择已选择的玩家)：你会得知他们之中是否有且仅有一名玩家是邪恶的。
flavor: You've been a great employee. Truly. You're like the son I never had. You always get here on time, you give us your effort, and you go home when you're done. Understand this hurts me just as much, maybe more, than it hurts you....but we're paying you 5 nickels an hour, and money is getting tight. I think you'll understand I don't mean anything against ya...but I'm afraid we're gonna have to let you go.

firstNightReminder: Point to an evil player or an Outsider. Recall that if they have the "false info" reminder token, that you must show them a player which is neither (most of the time, this is a Townsfolk).
otherNightReminder: Point to an evil player or an Outsider. Recall that if they have the "false info" reminder token, that you must show them a player which is neither (most of the time, this is a Townsfolk).
name: 阴谋家
ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知一名邪恶玩家或外来者。如果你的邻座存在非旅行者的邪恶玩家，你得知错误信息。
flavor: Don't you see it? Just beyond the edge of our eyes? They're working together...everyone is working together...I'm so glad you believe and trust me.

firstNightReminder: Each night, wake the Conductor. They choose up to 2 players -- Mark chosen evil players with the "Alerted" reminder. For each Townsfolk or Outsider player chosen, which isn't the Conductor (or a player already chosen), move the "Train" reminder one step clockwise. Put the Conductor to sleep. Wake all players with the "Alerted" reminder (separately). Show them the "This player is" info token and show them the Conductor character token, and point to the Conductor. Remove the "Alerted" reminder and put them to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Each night, wake the Conductor. They choose up to 2 players -- Mark chosen evil players with the "Alerted" reminder. For each Townsfolk or Outsider player chosen, which isn't the Conductor (or a player already chosen), move the "Train" reminder one step clockwise. Put the Conductor to sleep. Wake all players with the "Alerted" reminder (separately). Show them the "This player is" info token and show them the Conductor character token, and point to the Conductor. Remove the "Alerted" reminder and put them to sleep.
name: 检票员
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择至多两名玩家：如果你选择的玩家是邪恶的，他们会得知你是谁。如果你已选择了所有的镇民和外来者，你的阵营获胜。
flavor: This is the last call, all passengers on board immediately!

otherNightReminder: Check to see if either of the Demon's alive neighbors have since died. If this is the case, nod to the Carpenter yes, and if not, shake your head to the Carpenter no.
name: 木工
ability: 每个夜晚*，你会得知今晚是否有与恶魔邻座的存活玩家死亡。
flavor: כדי לבנות בית, כל פיסת עץ חייבת לסמוך זה על זה. לא הצלחתי לבנות כבר זמן מה...יש בוגד בתוכנו.

otherNightReminder: Show the Iconoclast a character token of a player with the "Voted" reminder.
name: 反传统者
ability: 每个夜晚*，你会得知一名在你首次提名时投过票的玩家的角色。
flavor: Your kings, they are dead. Your leaders have forsaken you. The trustworthy have turned traitorous. But you have yourself, and your community. There is a fire in all of us, and I plan to bring it forward! Follow my lead, our lead! Carry your banners like you carry your names! Carry your heart as you carry your flame! Die as you live, brothers, impossible to conquer! We live as one, and die as one! Onwards!

name: 博学者
ability: 每个白天，你可以私下询问说书人以得知两条信息：一个是正确的，一个是错误的。
attribution: The Pandemonium Institute. Art by Aiden Roberts.
flavor: Seventy-two matchsticks on the floor... the sun sets early but the moon is unchanged... a torn piece of cloth... evil in the manor house... three by three... the one we trusted is not what he seems... green light means magnesium... residue, but the pattern is wrong... Seventy-two matchsticks on the floor...

firstNightReminder: The Nightwatchman may point to a player. Wake that player, show the 'This character selected you' card and the Nightwatchman token, then point to the Nightwatchman player.
otherNightReminder: The Nightwatchman may point to a player. Wake that player, show the 'This character selected you' card and the Nightwatchman token, then point to the Nightwatchman player.
name: 守夜人
ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你可以选择一名玩家：他会得知你是守夜人。
attribution: The Pandemonium Institute. Art by Chloe McDougal.
flavor: The night is cold and lonely, but I have the moon, the stars, the crisp wind and the soft thud of leather boots on cobbled stone for company. Yonder, candlelight flickers behind a murky window...

name: 制烛人
ability: 每局游戏限一次，即使你已死亡，你可以公开选择一名玩家：如果选中了存活的爪牙，他的胜利条件改为与你相同。
flavor: There is hope for you yet. The seeds of darkness have not fully entangled your heart, and I can offer you light forward.

firstNightReminder: The Ragpicker may point to a character. Point to the player with that character token. If there are none, point to any player.
otherNightReminder: The Ragpicker may point to a character. Point to the player with that character token. If there are none, point to any player.
name: 拾荒者
ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你要选择一个非恶魔的角色：如果这个角色在场，你会得知他是谁，否则，你会得知错误信息。
flavor: Yes, this is a real job, now let me get back to my garbage!

otherNightReminder: The Medium will either nod or shake their head. If they nod, point to every dead player that is evil. If there are no dead evil players, shake your head "no" instead. Put the Medium to sleep. If they nod, the Medium loses their ability — mark them with the "No Ability" reminder and remove their night token from the night sheet. (The Medium won’t wake again.)
name: 通灵师
ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时*，你可以得知死亡玩家中哪些是邪恶的。
flavor: I like to be honest with my clients. Your grandfather is a real حمار.

name: 陆军上尉
ability: 每个白天，在提名阶段开始前，一名存活玩家可以公开选择另一名存活玩家：他死亡。如果善良玩家这么做，他的阵营落败。
flavor: Hello, friends! I believe I have finally found an appropriate context where war IS the solution! Allow me to test my theory-

otherNightReminder: Wake the player marked "Dead". Show them the "This character selected you" info token, and then the Shade character token. Put them to sleep. They die, but do not announce this tomorrow morning.
name: 暗影
ability: 每局游戏限一次，一名你投票的玩家可能在当晚死亡（且你会得知此事），但他会被当作存活直到他被处决。
flavor: I worry that when I'm not looking, people I love are dying, and they aren't around to tell me.

name: 牧羊人
ability: 如果只有三名玩家存活（旅行者除外），你的阵营会在黄昏时落败。
flavor: Look, I'm just used to taking care of my sheep and my dog. I don't know anythin' about these here demons! Get em away from me I say, get em away from me!

otherNightReminder: If the Cultist has the "Apocalypse" reminder, mark 3 players with the "Survives" reminder. That night, every player who doesn't have the "Survives" reminder dies. If only 3 players live, remove the Cultist's "Apocalypse" reminder token. Remember that the Cultist keeps this ability even after dying.
name: 异教徒
ability: 如果没有外来者存活，当晚除3名玩家以外的其他玩家全部死亡，即使你已死亡。
flavor: The ritual is too far gone to prevent it anymore. All I can do is warn those in it's wake.

name: 绅士
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一名善良玩家。每局游戏限一次，你可以公开命令他，如果他不服从他可能被处决。
flavor: If looks could kill, we’d both be dead. Let’s keep our beautiful eyes closed.

firstNightReminder: Wake all evil players. Show them the 'This character chose you' info token and then the Shankaar character token. Give them a silent countdown of '3, 2, 1…'. They can then secretly communicate for 1 minute. When the minute ends, put all evil players to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake all evil players. Show them the 'This character chose you' info token and then the Shankaar character token. Give them a silent countdown of '3, 2, 1…'. They can then secretly communicate for 1 minute. When the minute ends, put all evil players to sleep.
name: 商羯罗
ability: 每个夜晚，邪恶玩家可以秘密交流1分钟。[与你邻座的一名善良玩家会变成邪恶的商羯罗]
flavor: In fire we were born...In unity we live...

firstNightReminder: Wake all evil players. Show them the 'This character chose you' info token and then the Shankaar character token. Give them a silent countdown of '3, 2, 1…'. They can then secretly communicate for 1 minute. When the minute ends, put all evil players to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake all evil players. Show them the 'This character chose you' info token and then the Shankaar character token. Give them a silent countdown of '3, 2, 1…'. They can then secretly communicate for 1 minute. When the minute ends, put all evil players to sleep.
name: 商羯罗
ability: 每个夜晚，邪恶玩家可以秘密交流1分钟。[与你邻座的一名善良玩家会变成邪恶的商羯罗]
flavor: In unity we live...In fire we were born...

firstNightReminder: The Cryomancer either shakes their head or points to a character on their sheet. If the chosen character is in play, they are poisoned -- Mark them with one of the "Poisoned" reminder tokens. Put the Cryomancer to sleep. If the player marked "Frozen" is alive, wake them. Show them the "This character selected you" info token, and then the Cryomancer character token. Then, show them the character token of the character the Cryomancer pointed to. Put them to sleep. Put them to sleep. If the Cryomancer didn't choose a character tonight, don't wake the player marked "Frozen".
otherNightReminder: The Cryomancer either shakes their head or points to a character on their sheet. If the chosen character is in play, they are poisoned -- Mark them with one of the "Poisoned" reminder tokens. Put the Cryomancer to sleep. If the player marked "Frozen" is alive, wake them. Show them the "This character selected you" info token, and then the Cryomancer character token. Then, show them the character token of the character the Cryomancer pointed to. Put them to sleep. Put them to sleep. If the Cryomancer didn't choose a character tonight, don't wake the player marked "Frozen".
name: 寒冰法师
ability: 每个夜晚，你可以选择一个角色：如果该角色在场，他中毒。会有一名固定的存活善良玩家得知你选择的角色。
flavor: The final winter brings with it an infinite famine that lasts until the end of the earth.

name: 阿尔菲拉
ability: 每个白天，你可以公开猜测每名玩家的角色：如果你都猜对了，你的阵营获胜。

otherNightReminder: The Zabb-Yani chooses a player, that player dies -- Mark them with the "dead" reminder token. Think about what information this player has gained from abilities or game rules (such as Minion Info) this game. You may take one set of their information, and make whatever changes are needed to make that set of information false (were it to be learned tonight). You may use the Zabb-Yani's "?" reminder to aid you in this process.
name: 扎布·亚尼
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡且他得知过的正确信息可能转变为错误信息。[无外来者在场]
flavor: Less is more. Less body is more spirit. Less will to defy creation is more to create miracles. Less truth is more possibilities. Less hope is more obedience to fate.

otherNightReminder: The Rat King chooses a player, that player dies -- Mark them with the "dead" reminder token. If this is the first player who's died due to the Rat King ability, their Townsfolk neighbors are poisoned -- Mark them with the "poisoned" reminder tokens.
name: 鼠王
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。与你首次杀死的玩家邻近的镇民玩家中毒。
flavor: It started with one exiled man, yes that is true. But one man presumed dead quickly turned into two. And once there was three then it became a crowd. Who rued the fourth man, for he screamed so loud. The fifth man was lonely, had the crowd worried sick. So all the soiled men cheered when they threw down the sixth. Crushing the seventh man's head, the eighth man cried. "More bodies in the pit!" as they tossed in number nine.

firstNightReminder: During the first night, before they receive their Demon info, show the Grimm Reaper the character token of the player marked "Known". If there are less than 7 players, put the Grimm Reaper to sleep. If there are 7 or more players, provide the Grimm Reaper the rest of their Demon info, and then put them to sleep. After putting the Grimm Reaper to sleep, wake the player marked "Known" player, and show them the "This character selected you" info token and then the Grimm Reaper token. Put this player to sleep.
otherNightReminder: The Grimm Reaper points at any player. The chosen player dies—mark them with the "Dead" reminder token. Put the Grimm Reaper to sleep
name: 死神
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。你与一名镇民玩家知道对方在场但不知道是谁。每局游戏限一次，如果你们之一公开猜测对方的角色且猜测正确，其所对应的阵营获胜。
flavor: Your time has come, mortal. Do not run, for you shall rip your neck open in the cacophony. Only those who face death directly stand a chance against their end.

otherNightReminder: Choose a player who dies--mark them with the "Dead" reminder token. Remember that the Creepsye does not choose this player.
name: 爬行眼
ability: 从首个白天起，即使你已死亡，所有镇民“是恶魔”且你不是恶魔。每个夜晚*，会有一名玩家死亡。[+1外来者]
attribution: TheDarkArtist for the final wording and art touch ups.
flavor: No, doctor I don't think you're listening to me! I understand that rapid eye movement is normal whilst you sleep, but I don't think I am asleep. Am I?

firstNightReminder: remove the "Empowered" reminder token. The Coalcrusher chooses a player who isn't themself -- Mark this player with the "Empowered" reminder token.
otherNightReminder: remove the "Empowered" reminder token. The Coalcrusher chooses a player who isn't themself -- Mark this player with the "Empowered" reminder token.
name: 碎煤机
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择除你以外的一名玩家：如果他明天白天提名了另一名玩家，那名玩家会在黄昏死亡。
flavor: I'VE BEEN IN THE BLOODY MINES FOR 48 HOURS TODAY

firstNightReminder: Each night, wake the Loom weaver. They will either shake their head, or point to 2 players. If they point to 2 players, mark the Loom Weaver with the "Once" reminder token. If they already have this reminder token, mark them with the "No Ability" reminder token. If those 2 players are of the same alignments, swap their character tokens and mark both with the "Swapped" reminder tokens. Put the Loom Weaver to sleep. If the Loom Weaver has the "No ability" reminder token, remove their night token from the night sheet.
otherNightReminder: Each night, wake the Loom weaver. They will either shake their head, or point to 2 players. If they point to 2 players, mark the Loom Weaver with the "Once" reminder token. If they already have this reminder token, mark them with the "No Ability" reminder token. If those 2 players are of the same alignments, swap their character tokens and mark both with the "Swapped" reminder tokens. Put the Loom Weaver to sleep. If the Loom Weaver has the "No ability" reminder token, remove their night token from the night sheet.
name: 织布工
ability: 每局游戏限两次，你可以选择两名玩家：如果他们阵营相同，他们交换角色。
flavor: Oh you didn't hear the news? Nono, it's nothing important...but-

name: 伐木工
ability: 每局游戏限一次，你可以公开猜测一名玩家是一个善良角色：如果你猜测正确，当天白天与你对立阵营玩家的票数不会被秘密统计。
flavor: Measure once, cut twice.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Horse Hearer. They point at a player -- Mark them with the "Drunk" reminder token, they are drunk. Put the Horse Hearer to sleep. Wake the chosen player. Show them the "This character selected you" info token, and then the Horse Hearer character token. They will either nod or shake their head. If they shake their head, they are no longer drunk -- remove the "Drunk" reminder token. Put them to sleep. Wake the Horse Hearer. Show them what the chosen player did (so if they shook their head, you then shake yours). Put the Horse Hearer to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Horse Hearer. They point at a player -- Mark them with the "Drunk" reminder token, they are drunk. Put the Horse Hearer to sleep. Wake the chosen player. Show them the "This character selected you" info token, and then the Horse Hearer character token. They will either nod or shake their head. If they shake their head, they are no longer drunk -- remove the "Drunk" reminder token. Put them to sleep. Wake the Horse Hearer. Show them what the chosen player did (so if they shook their head, you then shake yours). Put the Horse Hearer to sleep.
name: 马语者
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：如果他同意，他醉酒直到下个黄昏且你会得知此事。
flavor: I can hear them. You could too. Just listen a little harder...A little more...A little more...A little more...

name: ‌面部窃取者
ability: 如果你正“疯狂”地证明自己是在场的一个角色且你与他阵营相同，你会获得他的能力。
flavor: Hey guys! Slow down, you got really far ahead of me. If there where anything out here, you guys could've lost me!

otherNightReminder: Show the player you choose the "This character selected you" Info Token and the Photographer Character Token. They then point to a player that they trust -- Mark them with the "Trusted" reminder token.
name: 摄影师
ability: 每个夜晚*，说书人可能会唤醒一名玩家以询问谁是一位他信任的玩家。
flavor: Nonono, you were smiling in that picture! We're gonna have to take another one, ugh.

name: 清道夫
ability: 游戏的最后一天持续时间会更长。
flavor: In the moments when the fire's brightest, are when those most desperate to survive do anything to live.

name: 出席者
ability: 玩家们必须举手并被说书人点名后才能进行公开行动。
flavor: hey, *hah*, guys *ah*, you'll uh, you'll never guess. *ugh*. You'll never guess who was going to wake at 6 in the *Afternoon* instead of the morning. I uh, *hah*, am glad that I'm finally here.
